meta.title: WillChain – Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.description: WillChain – automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_title: WillChain – Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When You're Gone – Your Assets Go to Whom You've Designated
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people die without a designated heir for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the money is there – but can't access it. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Crypto After You Pass?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it – until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one who knows the private key, your funds vanish forever when you're gone. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency sit untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – inaccessible to anyone.
problem.card3_desc: Even knowing funds exist, without the key or password, family can't access them. It's a legal dead end.

recycle.label: Recycle Funds
recycle.hint: If a wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and hasn't designated an heir, anyone can initiate the recycling of funds and receive 1% as a reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – Not yet abandoned (overall timeout not reached)

telegram.link_modal_success: Wallet connected! Return to the Telegram bot.

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps – and your crypto is protected
how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another holder. Your digital will activates as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your funds after your prolonged inactivity or passing. This could be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If your wallet hasn't been used for a while, click 'I'm Here!' manually.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity triggers the WillChain mechanism: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. This is followed by a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

credits.label: Trust
credits.title: Why Trust WillChain?
credits.subtitle: Transparency, security, and reliability – not just words, but proven facts.
credits.opensource_desc: All code is published on GitHub. Anyone can verify that the contract does exactly what it promises.
credits.audit_desc: The contract underwent an audit across 4 categories: protocol, security, UX, and operations. All identified issues have been fixed.
credits.tests_desc: Hardhat, Foundry fuzz, bot, frontend – every change is automatically tested before deployment.
credits.network_desc: Built on Base – a network by Coinbase. Transactions cost less than $0.01 and confirm in seconds.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir gets your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely unused.
faq.q2: What inactivity periods can I choose?
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this anytime. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days, while long-term investors opt for 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is designated or they don't claim in time, funds are recycled: 47% are permanently burned, 47% are distributed to WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you – with your private key – can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. The blockchain only stores your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps. No names or personal information.
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does auto-timer reset work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (e.g., Safe) where a relayer executes transactions, you'll need to confirm your activity manually via the website button.
faq.q8: Can a DEX or dApp approval affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token approvals (allowances) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – transfers, confirmActivity, or vault configuration – count as proof of presence. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will process even with active DEX allowances.
faq.q9: Can I designate an heir who has already designated me?
faq.a9: No. The contract prevents circular inheritance (A→B and B→A simultaneously). This protects against a situation where both wallets lock each other out. If you wish to be mutual heirs, use an intermediate third address.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as proof of presence: token transfers, activity confirmations, or vault configuration. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read carefully before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, company shares, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token destruction mechanism is a technical tool to clear the network of inactive participants, not a promise of increased market value. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmations before the set deadline. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: Users must independently verify that using WillChain does not violate the laws of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.

tiers.title: Vault Tier
tiers.subtitle: Your tier is determined by the amount of WILL you hold

transfer_modal.subtitle: Sending automatically confirms your activity
transfer_modal.activity_reset_hint: Directly sending WILL resets your activity timer. DEX swaps via allowance do not reset it – use confirmActivity() to confirm presence.
